commit_message:
[LANG-1811] ArrayUtils.shuffle() throws NullPointerException for null
array input.

- Null test assertions are from PR #1553.
- null inputs are now no-ops
- This follows the class Javadoc and other method implementations in
this class
- Javadoc @param updates
issue_summary: ArrayUtils.shuffle() throws NullPointerException for null array input
javadoc_before: /** * Shuffles randomly the elements of the specified array using the Fisher-Yates shuffle * algorithm. * * @param array the array to shuffle. * @param random the source of randomness used to permute the elements. * @see Fisher-Yates shuffle algorithm * @since 3.6 */
javadoc_after: /** * Shuffles randomly the elements of the specified array using the Fisher-Yates shuffle * algorithm. * * @param array the array to shuffle, no-op if {@code null}. * @param random the source of randomness used to permute the elements, no-op if {@code null}. * @see Fisher-Yates shuffle algorithm * @since 3.6 */
entity_signature: public static void shuffle(final boolean[] array, final Random random)
